subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him by whose Light the earth is illumined and by whose Manifestation the heavens are made resplendent, Who hath manifested Himself upon the sacred Mount of the right side [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن اشرقت الارض بنوره و اضائت السماء بظهوره و تجلی بالطور الایمن البقعه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
